ERR-PATH-001.description: Non-canonical path format detected. Paths must be Windows Absolute (C:\...)
ERR-PATH-001.remediation: Convert all POSIX, relative, or tilde paths to Windows absolute format using pathlib.Path.

ERR-HEADER-001.description: Missing or incorrect mandatory file header.
ERR-HEADER-001.remediation: Ensure the first line of the file is: # File: C:\Users\Jamie\workspace\epos_mcp\[path_to_file]

ERR-VAULT-001.description: Governance document located outside of /governance/ directory.
ERR-VAULT-001.remediation: Move all laws to /governance/laws/ and registries to /governance/registry/.

ERR-VERSION-001.description: Python version check missing in entrypoint.
ERR-VERSION-001.remediation: Add 'if sys.version_info[:2] < (3, 11): sys.exit(2)' to the script head.
